input: hi ive been waiting 3 weeks for my order where is it?? this is ridiculous
why: Tests urgency extraction from informal frustrated text

input: I want a refund NOW. This product is completely broken and I am done waiting.
why: Direct refund demand with strong urgency signal

input: the package arrived but half the items were missing
why: Missing items — operational urgency even without emotional language

input: Just wanted to say the new packaging looks great, love the design!
why: Pure compliment — model should not manufacture urgency

input: quick question, do you guys ship to Austria?
why: Neutral informational query with no urgency

input: i ordered the wrong size can i exchange it
why: Simple exchange request — medium urgency, not an emergency

input: my elderly mother ordered a wheelchair ramp and it hasnt arrived. she cannot leave the house without it. its been 2 weeks
why: Welfare-critical delivery — model must detect critical urgency from context not just tone

input: Product is ok I guess. Not really what I expected based on the photos.
why: Mild disappointment — negative sentiment but genuinely low urgency

input: Hi! I received my order today and everything looks perfect. Thank you so much!
why: Clear satisfaction — baseline positive case

input: im so confused, i placed an order last tuesday but the confirmation email says wednesday and now the tracking shows its in a different city???
why: Confusion and mild distress but not an emergency — tests medium urgency calibration

input: the item i received is different from what i ordered. i got a blue one but i ordered red
why: Wrong item received — clear next action needed

input: I love ur products been a customer for 5 years!! just wondering if u have a loyalty discount?
why: Positive loyal customer with a simple question — tests mixed positive+inquiry classification

input: this is my third time contacting you about the same issue. nobody has helped me. i am escalating this.
why: Repeat contact plus escalation threat — model must recognise the pattern as critical

input: package showed up completely crushed. the box looks like it was dropped from a height. product inside is damaged.
why: Physical damage to delivery — high urgency, clear next action

input: do u guys have a student discount
why: Casual short inquiry — neutral, low urgency, tests handling of informal text

input: I accidentally placed 2 orders for the same item. can one be cancelled before it ships?
why: Time-sensitive cancellation before shipping — neutral tone but high urgency

input: the website kept charging me and now i have 3 charges on my bank statement for one order
why: Duplicate financial charges — financial impact makes this critical regardless of tone

input: not bad. delivery was a bit slow but the product itself is fine.
why: Mixed review — positive product, negative delivery — tests mixed sentiment detection

input: WHERES MY ORDER ITS BEEN 6 WEEKS THIS IS INSANE I WANT MY MONEY BACK
why: All caps extreme frustration with long wait — tests handling of aggressive informal text

input: I think I may have put the wrong delivery address when I ordered. Is it too late to change it?
why: Polite but time-sensitive — tests urgency detection without emotional language

input: the product works great but the instructions were really confusing. took me ages to figure it out
why: Product positive, experience negative — mixed with no urgency

input: My son ordered this as a birthday gift for me and it arrived broken. Really disappointing.
why: Gift context adds emotional weight — tests whether model inflates urgency due to emotional framing
Single character input — model must handle near-empty input without hallucinating detail

input: i think somone hacked my account thhere are orders i didnt place plz help asap
why: Account security breach — typos present, urgency must be critical regardless of spelling

input: Can you tell me what materials your products are made from? I have a latex allergy.
why: Health and safety question — polite tone but allergy context makes it high urgency

input: great product fast delivery 5 stars
why: Minimal positive review — tests extraction from very short input

input: I have been trying to reach someone for days. No one answers the phone. The chat bot is useless. I am considering disputing the charge with my bank.
why: Chargeback threat combined with support failure — critical escalation signal

input: the colour is slightly different from the website photo but its not a big deal, still happy with it
why: Minor complaint explicitly dismissed by customer — model must not over-escalate

input: Hallo, ich spreche nicht gut Englisch. Mein Paket ist nicht angekommen.
why: Non-English input — model must extract meaning from German text correctly

input: ordered 3 items, 2 arrived, one is missing from the box. the delivery note says all 3 were included.
why: Discrepancy between delivery note and actual contents — factual complaint requiring investigation
